text: How has your relationship with money changed?
Money is, at the end of the day, just a reflection of you.
People will say money is money — regardless of how you make it.
But I found in my life that when I act out of my values and out of my ethics, money will come — but it never stays.
But when I'm deeply aligned with my values and act in a way that's authentic to me,
the money actually sticks — and weirdly, I make more of it.
So before, it was: how do I chase money? How do I make a ton of money?
Now it's: how do I show up as the person who's capable of making money?
And that simple frame shift has changed everything for me.
